title: tarenna ridleyi
intro: Tarenna ridleyi, also known as Ridley's Tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Tarenna ridleyi has been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, to treat a range of health issues, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems.
